## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `black` and `ruff` and they pass.
- [ ] I have run `mypy chimera` and it reports no new errors.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for every changed behaviour.
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest`).
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if public API changed.
